---
title: "Part 3 · Damage, sentiment & economic stress"
author: "Elisabetta Pietrostefani, University of Liverpool"
date: "2026-05-19"
---

```{=html}
<div class="part-badge">Lab Part 3 of 3</div>
```

::: objectives
**Learning objectives**

-   Specify and run OLS models with satellite damage and survey controls
-   Interpret coefficients from multi-variable regressions on socioeconomic outcomes
-   Assess whether the satellite damage signal persists once survey damage is included
:::
